$description: Animation duration tokens. Extracted from www CSS transitions and Patina globals.

moderate.$description: Card hover, image zoom, team photo reveal (www)

slow.$description: Hero slide-up, hover-scale (www). Also Patina slide-up.

reveal.$description: Canvas viewport-entry reveal. Used by Lissajous phase-portrait one-shot trace draw on first visibility. Long enough that the trace reads as drawn, not teleported.

reveal-long.$description: Full narrative scrub animation. Used by ResolutionComparison to sweep sampling rate 8kHz → 1Hz → 8kHz so the viewer understands the full gradient before interacting.
